meaning: adj.没有受教育的,没有学问的
examples: Untaught people whose verbal skills are grossly deficient.
Better be untaught, for ignorance is the root of misfortune.
Quite an untaught genius, I made the discovery of the line of action for myself.
But a still stronger consideration is the importance of adhering to a simple principle, intelligible to the most untaught capacity.
